arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal and Aston Villa eye 'world-class' star Man City sold for £47m, Arteta is a big fan
Pep Guardiola's 'new job plan' after Man City boss waited months to reply to England offer
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's future at Manchester City is still extremely uncertain, but a source close to him claims he does have some ideas of what he wants to do

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland becoming "burden in dressing room" says it all as transfer stance emerges
arts.sum: Manchester City striker Erling Haaland continues to be linked with a huge transfer to Spain, and it now seems as though the Norway star is open to joining Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland makes decision on new Man City contract
arts.sum: The report claims that those at Man City 'expect' the Spanish tactician to add at least one more year to his expiring contract to help the club put a proper succession plan in place and this, it is claimed, could make Haaland's decision of whether or not to sign a new deal a very simple one. Erling Haaland is'so happy' at Manchester City that he would jump at the opportunity to sign a new contract, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Man City aren't used to winning games late - Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says they are not used to "winning so late" after a narrow 2-1 victory against Wolverhampton Wanderers secured by a John Stones header deep into added time.

arts.ttl: Should Wolves have reacted quicker to controversial Man City winner?
arts.sum: Watch Match of the Day 2 pundits Danny Murphy, Rafa Benitez and Theo Walcott question whether the Wolves players should have protested more quickly against John Stones' contested late winner for Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Why Ederson almost missed Atalanta-Celtic over a dentist appointment
arts.sum: Ederson reveals why a visit to the dentist almost ruled him out of today’s Champions...

arts.ttl: 'According to UEFA': Guardiola has now called Man City U19 star up for Champions League clash - journalist
Pep Guardiola open to sensational England U-turn after being 'offered the job' by FA
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola WAS offered the England job according to Guillem Balague, who believes the Spaniard could still manage the Three Lions in the future

arts.ttl: Man City vs Sparta Prague live early team news plus kick-off time and how to watch
arts.sum: Manchester City take on Sparta Prague at the Etihad tonight in the Champions League
